channel.title: MiSTer FPGA Core & Arcade Tracker: All changes
channel.description: New cores/games and shipped updates in the public MiSTer databases, from the daily tracker crawl. Filtered variants: feed-new.xml (new only), feed-updates.xml (updates only).

item.title: [New] Legionnaire (Arcade)
item.description:
Fighter / 1992 / Tad Corporation

Core: Legionnaire

New in the public MiSTer databases on 2026-07-15 (source: distribution_mister).

Commit history
